Nymp is probably your best universal poison unit just because she is Chaos
With that atk potency poison SR wheel, all of her skills apply poison (except her def)
Her best team is probably Aequor since they have Miryam, 24. 2 very good units.
The only unit that can trigger/detonate poison without condition. She just need to ult/exalt. Miryam need red stance, 24 need to mania exalt, Faros trigger is so low even if she get that from her rouse.
Actually has good aliemus gen since her rouse makes all her cards gain aliemus
And she has both vulnerable and weakness in her 3 cost
Here is the problem: 
- Low stat. Hame has better atk stat than her. A lv80 Nymp can’t reach 100hp. She will be detrimental in your team just because of her stat. Unit with higher max hp like Sal or Caecus scales better with account lv buff for max team hp
- Can be a strenght scaling attacker since her 2 cost apply poison base on the dmg deal. Don’t expect her to ramp up fast tho.
- She has a shield in her 3 cost. Which is shitty because her def stat is low low. Why would they even give her a shield in that skill.

Poison need to stall before the stacks are big enough
All poison units have shitty hp and def with the exception of Agrippa (she a def unit)

Without specific relics and orison
You better play another team like Gelot

Ofc there is some boss fight that is poison positive since they slap poison relic in your team
and someboss allow you to stall them for big poison stack

One more thing, the best poison wheel is locked behind paywall
You need to buy the BP for that wheel (Falling Sun)

Unlike Retaliate that can deal dmg outside of retal (Pandia’s ult, Wanda 3 cost and force double hit on enemies, Caecus Aequor status, Nautila op ult)
Poison needs too much too work imo
and when you make them work, the pay off is not sastify enough to justify all those wasted times
